text: All ten bugs fixed and covered: beta==0 assign-not-read in all four kernels (dgemv/dgemvRowMajor/dgemvColMajor/dgemm); sparse+solver destination stride honored; COO.t canonical flag; rank tolerance floor removed (scale-relative, all-zero->rank 0); rows*cols overflow guard via requireStorable + LinAlgError.InvalidArgument + Shape.size: Long; MatrixMarket full header validation; solver initial-guess mismatch throws; GMRES happy breakdown terminates + LS Left no longer swallowed; SGS/b-length guards; DuplicatePolicy.Error -> LinAlgError. Spot-verified in source: DoubleKernels.scala:140,173,209,256; Factorizations rank tol; Solvers.scala:264-304; Matrix.scala requireStorable. Evidence: testAll 94/94 JVM+JS, benchCompile green.
